author: mark
text:
Collapse duplicated state-branch bootstrap and core-lib helpers

Six mechanical copy-paste sites consolidated, mostly in the state-branch bootstrap path where the master_url clone model grew parallel copies of seeding, symlink, and git-wrapper logic. Pure consolidation, no behaviour change.

seed_tasks_dir shared by both bootstrap paths; materialize_symlink behind the three ensure_*_symlink helpers; one canonical STATE_BRANCH const in git_state; next_free_id folded into task_id::next_unique_id; git_state::run and state_repo::run_at replaced by git::run_git_ok; the two is_symlink copies replaced by std Path::is_symlink.
